reply:
### Simple Dog Sales Advert Website Below is a simple HTML code for a dog sales advert website. #### HTML Code ```html

Dog Sales Advert

Welcome to our dog sales website!

Available Dogs

  • Golden Retriever
  • Poodle
  • Bulldog

Contact Us

Phone: 123-456-7890

Email: [info@dogs.com](mailto:info@dogs.com)

``` To view this HTML code as a functional website, you would typically save it with an `.html` extension (e.g., `dog_sales.html`) and open it in a web browser. However, as this is a text-based interface, I can provide you with the code but not a direct link to a live website. #### Explanation - The website starts with a heading (`

`) that says "Dog Sales Advert". - A paragraph (`

`) welcomes visitors to the website. - A list (`

    `) of available dog breeds is provided under the heading "Available Dogs". - Contact information, including phone number and email, is listed under "Contact Us". #### Note This code represents a basic static HTML page. For a fully functional website, you might consider adding more features, such as CSS for styling, JavaScript for interactivity, and potentially a backend for dynamic content and user interaction. However, based on your request, this example focuses solely on the HTML frontend.
